entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia identified as a prominent greening hotspot.

entities.name: GREENING
entities.description: The increase in vegetation cover or leaf area in an ecosystem.

entities.name: CROPLANDS
entities.description: Land used for agricultural crop production.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to land or soil to assist in the production of crops.

entities.name: CROP WATER STRESS
entities.description: A state where the water available to a plant is insufficient to meet its needs.

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural output produced.

entities.name: SATELLITE-DERIVED LEAF AREA DATA
entities.description: Data obtained from satellites to measure the leaf area index of vegetation.

entities.name: SURVEY-BASED AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Data collected through surveys regarding agricultural practices and outputs.

entities.name: LAND SURFACE MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical models used to simulate the interaction between the land surface and the atmosphere.

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: A period of the year characterized by low rainfall.

entities.name: DRIER ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low precipitation and arid conditions.

entities.name: YIELD ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The increase in the amount of crop produced per unit area.

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The number of crops grown on a piece of land in a year.

entities.name: LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of managing land and its resources for agricultural production.

entities.name: CO2 FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The increase in plant growth and productivity due to higher atmospheric CO2 concentrations.

entities.name: EARTH OBSERVATION
entities.description: The collection of information about the Earth's physical, chemical, and biological systems via remote sensing.

entities.name: LAND SYSTEM SCIENCE
entities.description: An interdisciplinary field studying the interactions between human and natural systems on land.
